title: [ARCHIVED] More Bricks Plus
description: Addon mod for More Bricks that adds Polished and Brick wall variants for Granite, Andesite and Diorite.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/7vJUhps4dt) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459) 

Addon mod for [More Bricks](https://modrinth.com/mod/morebricks) that adds Polished and Brick wall variants for Granite, Andesite and Diorite. Works without More Bricks, however only Polished bricks will be obtainable without the mod installed.
